dashboard.pulseHeadline: Rising food costs hit NJ diners — smart operators are pivoting menus now
dashboard.weeklyBrief: This week, Nutley's restaurant scene faces margin pressure from rising dairy costs (+4.2% MoM). Local foot traffic is up 12% due to spring weather, but three major competitors cut lunch service. Opportunity: capture displaced lunch crowd.

topInsights.title: dairy_cost_spike
topInsights.recommendation: Raise pasta dish prices by $1.50 this Friday — dairy costs up 4.2% MoM, your margin is compressed.

topInsights.title: lunch_opportunity
topInsights.recommendation: Add a $14.99 express lunch special by Wednesday — 3 competitors just cut lunch service.

topInsights.title: spring_traffic
topInsights.recommendation: Post outdoor seating photos to Instagram this weekend — foot traffic is up 12% with the warm forecast.

dashboard.communityBuzz: Nutley residents are buzzing about the new Saturday Farmers Market launch at Community Park — expect 200+ foot traffic boost nearby.
